tools.name: backend.cloneBackend
tools.description: This operation clones an existing backend.

tools.name: backend.createBackend
tools.description: This operation creates a backend for an Amplify app. Backends are automatically created at the time of app creation.

tools.name: backend.createBackendApi
tools.description: Creates a new backend API resource.

tools.name: backend.createBackendAuth
tools.description: Creates a new backend authentication resource.

tools.name: backend.createBackendConfig
tools.description: Creates a config object for a backend.

tools.name: backend.createBackendStorage
tools.description: Creates a backend storage resource.

tools.name: backend.createToken
tools.description: Generates a one-time challenge code to authenticate a user into your Amplify Admin UI.

tools.name: backend.deleteBackend
tools.description: Removes an existing environment from your Amplify project.

tools.name: backend.deleteBackendApi
tools.description: Deletes an existing backend API resource.

tools.name: backend.deleteBackendAuth
tools.description: Deletes an existing backend authentication resource.

tools.name: backend.deleteBackendStorage
tools.description: Removes the specified backend storage resource.

tools.name: backend.deleteToken
tools.description: Deletes the challenge token based on the given appId and sessionId.

tools.name: backend.generateBackendApiModels
tools.description: Generates a model schema for an existing backend API resource.

tools.name: backend.getBackend
tools.description: Provides project-level details for your Amplify UI project.

tools.name: backend.getBackendApi
tools.description: Gets the details for a backend API.

tools.name: backend.getBackendApiModels
tools.description: Gets a model introspection schema for an existing backend API resource.

tools.name: backend.getBackendAuth
tools.description: Gets a backend auth details.

tools.name: backend.getBackendJob
tools.description: Returns information about a specific job.

tools.name: backend.getBackendStorage
tools.description: Gets details for a backend storage resource.

tools.name: backend.getToken
tools.description: Gets the challenge token based on the given appId and sessionId.

tools.name: backend.importBackendAuth
tools.description: Imports an existing backend authentication resource.

tools.name: backend.importBackendStorage
tools.description: Imports an existing backend storage resource.

tools.name: backend.listBackendJobs
tools.description: Lists the jobs for the backend of an Amplify app.

tools.name: backend.removeAllBackends
tools.description: Removes all backend environments from your Amplify project.

tools.name: backend.removeBackendConfig
tools.description: Removes the AWS resources required to access the Amplify Admin UI.

tools.name: backend.updateBackendApi
tools.description: Updates an existing backend API resource.

tools.name: backend.updateBackendAuth
tools.description: Updates an existing backend authentication resource.

tools.name: backend.updateBackendConfig
tools.description: Updates the AWS resources required to access the Amplify Admin UI.

tools.name: backend.updateBackendJob
tools.description: Updates a specific job.

tools.name: backend.updateBackendStorage
tools.description: Updates an existing backend storage resource.

tools.name: s3Buckets.listS3Buckets
tools.description: The list of S3 buckets in your account.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
